title: Crazy Craft Gaming SMP
description: A modpack ready to use in our Gaming SMP
body:
## Crazy Craft Gaming Modpack

**Basic starter pack for the Crazy Craft Gaming SMP!**

We built this **small, easy-to-use modpack** so our community can hop in without hunting down the right mods, just install and play!

---

### ✨ Why download this modpack?

Whether you’re teaming up for **survival challenges**, running **mini-games**, or racing through **parkour maps**, this pack gives you everything you need for smooth, fun gameplay—no clutter, no heavy grind.

* ⚡ Optimized for fast loading and steady FPS
* 🎯 Fair and balanced—no minimap or freecam, so every jump and discovery counts
* 🧩 Flexible for different playstyles: survival, adventure, building, events and more

---

### 🛠️ Mods Included

**Performance & Graphics**

- sodium, sodium-extra, lithium, ferritecore
- BetterF3 for a cleaner debug screen

**Quality of Life & Utility**

- BetterAdvancements, BetterStats
- LambdaDynamicLights, Status, Tablist Health Indicator
- VoiceChat
- Bobby, Cloth Config, Fabric API, Architectury, Placeholder API, TCDCommons, ModMenu

**Sound & Atmosphere**

- Sound Physics Remastered for immersive audio
- iris (for shaders)

---

### 🎯 Designed on Purpose

- **no freecam** mods, to keep exploration and gameplay fair and exciting.
- A few mods are **intentionally left out** for the smoothest SMP experience.

---

### 🖥️ How to join

Our SMP is **whitelist-only**.
[Join our Discord]([your-discord-invite-link](https://discord.gg/McRSnK3agZ)) to request access and start your adventure.

---

💡 **Note**

_This pack is the **official starter kit** for the Crazy Craft Gaming SMP, but you’re free to use it for your own worlds if you like._
